name: The Fringe Golf Club
address: 214 N Franklin St STE A, Red Lion, PA 17356
about: The Fringe Golf Club offers a premier indoor golf simulator experience suitable for both casual players and serious golfers. The facility features comprehensive golfing amenities including simulator rentals, professional lessons, and a convenient online booking system. Located adjacent to Franklin Street Social, a dining complex with 13 unique restaurants, it provides a convenient and enjoyable environment for golfers of all skill levels. The club operates as a BYOB establishment, allowing guests to bring their own beverages while playing. Memberships and group event rentals are available, with special accommodations for parties of six or more.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium golf simulator technology suitable for all skill levels
Convenient location with extensive dining options nearby
Flexible booking system and BYOB policy
Ideal for group events and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Available at adjacent Franklin Street Social complex with 13 unique restaurants

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention whether club rentals are available or if you need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, The Fringe Golf Club operates as a BYOB establishment, allowing you to bring your favorite beverages to enjoy while you play. Food is available at the adjacent Franklin Street Social complex.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the average time required to complete 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is The Fringe Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, the venue appears family-friendly with its welcoming atmosphere and availability for group outings, suggesting it can accommodate children and families.
